overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, starting near an illuminated food stall with paper lanterns, proceeding through a tree-lined open area with a large glass dome structure, and entering a yellow-lit industrial pedestrian tunnel. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with prominent cyan and yellow neon lighting typical of the cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic food kiosk with illuminated paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking past an illuminated food stall with traditional-style paper lanterns hanging overhead

entered.detail: modern food counter with bright white illumination and hanging paper lanterns with Japanese characters
rectangular concrete seating blocks with integrated ground lighting
mature trees with uplighting planted in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a brightly lit food stall with traditional paper lanterns, then moves forward into a spacious plaza. The camera walks past the stall, revealing concrete benches and trees ahead in the open pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined plaza with glass dome structure

events.description: moves from semi-covered stall area into fully open plaza space
camera tilts upward to view the large glass dome structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking up at the illuminated glass dome structure

entered.detail: large geodesic glass dome with teal neon lighting visible through the tree canopy
rectangular concrete blocks with integrated strip lighting surrounding trees

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the open plaza, the camera tilts up to reveal a massive glass dome structure glowing with teal light above the trees. The area features concrete planters with integrated lighting and scattered benches, creating a serene nighttime atmosphere.

events.description: approaching the tunnel entrance with illuminated vending machines becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza toward a tunnel entrance lined with vending machines

entered.detail: row of illuminated blue vending machines with bright digital displays
large cylindrical structural column painted yellow
arched entrance to covered walkway with warm yellow interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the plaza, passing more trees and benches while approaching a tunnel entrance. A row of glowing blue vending machines and a large yellow support column mark the transition point to the covered walkway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian tunnel with ventilation fans

events.description: enters the covered tunnel with yellow walls and industrial ventilation fans
lighting shifts from warm yellow to cooler tones as approaching the tunnel exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial tunnel toward the exit, passing large ventilation fans and advertising screens

entered.detail: large circular metal ventilation fans mounted on the yellow tunnel walls
overhead linear fluorescent lighting fixtures on the tunnel ceiling
illuminated digital billboards displaying advertisements on tunnel walls
opening at the end of the tunnel leading to exterior street with visible street lamp

segments.scene_description: Entering the tunnel, the environment shifts to an enclosed industrial space with yellow walls, large ventilation fans, and fluorescent lighting. The camera proceeds through the corridor, passing digital advertising screens and approaching the tunnel exit where exterior lighting becomes visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, open-air cyberpunk plaza into a confined industrial corridor. It begins beside a brightly lit food stall adorned with traditional paper lanterns, moving forward past concrete benches and trees into a spacious pedestrian area. As the camera advances, it tilts upward to reveal a massive glass dome glowing with teal light, while the surrounding plaza maintains a serene atmosphere with integrated lighting in concrete planters. The scene then shifts toward a tunnel entrance, passing a row of glowing blue vending machines and a large yellow support column that marks the transition to a covered walkway. Finally, the camera enters an enclosed industrial space characterized by yellow walls, large ventilation fans, and fluorescent lighting, proceeding past digital advertising screens toward the tunnel exit.
